home.description: Specializing in building high-performance, visually immersive web applications with <1>React.js</1> & <2>Laravel</2>

aboutme.title: About Me
aboutme.whoami: I’m a <1>Computer Science Engineering student</1> and a <1>Software Developer</1> focussed on creating structured, efficient web applications. I enjoy the logic of a solid backend in Laravel just as much as crafting a smooth frontend in React.
aboutme.about: I’m looking to bring my attention to detail and interest in clean code to a professional team where I can continue to grow.
